title: Gauhati High Court Judicial Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Gauhati High Court Judicial Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 19 May 2026 on the official website Gauhati High Court. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the Gauhati High Court Judicial Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 32 years Age Relaxation: ST: 5 years (upper limit 37 years); Government Employees: equal to years of service subject to max 5 years; PwBD: additional 10 years

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate from a recognized University, Working knowledge of Computer
qualification.details: Must be a graduate from a recognized University. Must have working knowledge of Computer.

salary_details.details: Pay Level 10: Rs. 37800 - 119700 Per Month + Grade Pay 4200

selection_process: Written Examination (100 marks) Interview/Viva voce (20 marks) Document Verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Gauhati High Court to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
